tables.description: Sample ID, analyte type, body site where sample was obtained, histological type of sample and tumor status of sample of participants with or without colorectal cancer and involved in the "Transdisciplinary Studies of Genetic Variation in Colorectal Cancer(CORECT): Axiom GWAS" project.

variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS

variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

tables.description: Subject ID, age at diagnosis, and sex of participants with or without colorectal cancer and involved in the "Transdisciplinary Studies of Genetic Variation in Colorectal Cancer(CORECT): Axiom GWAS" project.

variables.description: Age at diagnosis for cases [subjects with colorectal cancer], age at recruitment for controls
